steps.title: Use the survey proportion
steps.content: The sample estimate is $20\%$, or $0.20$, of the Spanish club students.

steps.title: Apply it to all 55 students
steps.content: Estimate the total number by multiplying: $$0.20\cdot55=11$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A is $11$, so A is correct.

steps.title: Check the estimate size
steps.content: Since $20%$ is one-fifth, the estimate should be one-fifth of $55$. One-fifth of $55$ is $11$, so the total should be much less than $55$ but greater than $0$.
